mapper.insert:
insert into execution_event(id, turn_id, task_id, task_detail_id, event_type, step_name, command_name, command_content, response_content, failure_reason, sequence_no, started_at, finished_at, atomic_command_id, atomic_command_code, provider_id, provider_name, model_id, model_code, create_time, status) values
(#{entity.id}, #{entity.turnId}, #{entity.taskId}, #{entity.taskDetailId}, #{entity.eventType}, #{entity.stepName}, #{entity.commandName}, #{entity.commandContent}, #{entity.responseContent}, #{entity.failureReason}, #{entity.sequenceNo}, #{entity.startedAt}, #{entity.finishedAt}, #{entity.atomicCommandId}, #{entity.atomicCommandCode}, #{entity.providerId}, #{entity.providerName}, #{entity.modelId}, #{entity.modelCode}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.status})
